title: A Dirty Meeting
content: You track Miller's unmarked car to a basement casino in Camden. Staying in the shadows, you watch him meet a suspicious-looking man in a dark, oil-stained jacket.||The exchange is quick and tense. Miller looks terrified, glancing over his shoulder as if he expects the shadows to swallow him whole. He hands over a small package and leaves without a word.||You don't recognize the man, but his cold, predatory gaze is chilling. It's clear that Miller isn't just taking bribes from high-rise offices; he's answering to someone far more dangerous from the streets.||📝 FILES UPDATED: Miller's street meeting logged.
